mission

Manning National Zoo

An Episode 1 mission that sends Division Agents through Outcast defenses to confront faction leader Emeline Shaw.

Connectionnot applicable Continuitydivision game universe Canon scopegame canon Verificationsource reviewed Reviewed2026-07-19

Outcast confrontation

Manning National Zoo continues the conflict with the Outcasts after Roosevelt Island. Agents breach the faction's defenses and pursue Emeline Shaw through the site. [1]

Claim ledger

Every factual statement below must retain at least one traceable source.

  1. confirmed

    Ubisoft introduced Manning National Zoo as one of the two narrative missions in Episode 1: D.C. Outskirts — Expeditions. [1]

  2. confirmed

    After her defeat on Roosevelt Island, Outcast leader Emeline Shaw retreats into the zoo and is protected by Outcast blockades and followers. [1]

  3. confirmed

    The mission objective is to hunt and confront Emeline Shaw inside the zoo. [1]

  1. [1] Intelligence Annex: Manning National Zoo & Camp White Oak — Ubisoft (2019-07-23). Accessed 2026-07-19.
